title: Enforce property or SpEL in @Value annotation
description: The @Value annotation in Spring should only be used to inject property values or SpEL expressions. Using hardcoded values or unsupported formats can lead to configuration issues and reduce maintainability. This rule ensures that @Value is used correctly to promote flexible and maintainable code.
recommendation: Use @Value only with property placeholders or valid SpEL expressions. Avoid hardcoded or invalid values in the annotation.

checks.message: @Value should use property placeholders or SpEL expressions
